SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt

Class FinalHeapResolution

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.FinalHeapResolution
public class FinalHeapResolution extends Object
A little helper class to resolve the settings for treatment of final fields. During the generation of ProofOblInputs, we need to know which final-treatment is activated. Also during translation from JML to JavaDL this is needed. Unfortunately, the settings are not directly available everywhere, so there is a mechanism to remember the setting while it is available in a thread-local variable. This class provides a simple interface to access this boolean variable. The alternative would be to make the settings available at more spots ...

    static boolean
    isFinalEnabled(@NonNull InitConfig initConfig)
    Returns whether final fields are treated different from normal fields as immutable data.
    static boolean

    static boolean
    recallIsFinalEnabled()
    Recall a previously stored status regarding the treatment of final fields.
    static void
    rememberIfFinalEnabled(InitConfig initConfig)
    Remembers if final fields are treated differently from normal fields as immutable flag in a thread-local variable that can be recalled later using recallIsFinalEnabled().

  • Method Details

    • isFinalEnabled

      public static boolean isFinalEnabled(@NonNull InitConfig initConfig)
      Returns whether final fields are treated different from normal fields as immutable data. If initConfig does not have settings yet, the default settings are used.
      Parameters:
      initConfig - the configuration to read the settings from
      Returns:
      true if final fields are treated as immutable

    • isFinalEnabled

      public static boolean isFinalEnabled(@NonNull ProofSettings settings)
      Returns whether final fields are treated different from normal fields as immutable data.
      Parameters:
      settings - the settings to read the settings from
      Returns:
      true if final fields are treated as immutable

    • rememberIfFinalEnabled

      public static void rememberIfFinalEnabled(InitConfig initConfig)
      Remembers if final fields are treated differently from normal fields as immutable flag in a thread-local variable that can be recalled later using recallIsFinalEnabled().
      Parameters:
      initConfig - the configuration to read the settings from

    • recallIsFinalEnabled

      public static boolean recallIsFinalEnabled()
      Recall a previously stored status regarding the treatment of final fields. See rememberIfFinalEnabled(InitConfig).
      Returns:
      true if final fields are treated as immutable (as recorded earlier)
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the variable has not been set before
